item.title: Companion artifact system
item.intent: Series installments must be able to ship with companion artifacts — checklists, templates, decision frameworks, comparison matrices — displayed inline and linked to GitHub, so readers get actionable tools alongside the narrative.
item.description: Extend the series content collection schema with an optional companionArtifacts array field. Create a component to render artifact cards on series detail pages. Each artifact: title, type (checklist/template/framework/matrix), description, githubUrl.
steps: Extend series Zod schema in src/content.config.ts with optional companionArtifacts: z.array(z.object({title: z.string(), type: z.enum(['checklist','template','framework','matrix']), description: z.string(), githubUrl: z.string().url()})).optional()
Create src/components/CompanionArtifact.astro — renders a card with title, type badge, description, and GitHub icon link
Integrate CompanionArtifact into src/pages/series/[slug].astro between content body and subscribe CTA; only render the artifacts section if companionArtifacts is defined and non-empty

Add at least two companion artifacts (one checklist, one framework) to src/content/series/agent-infra-maturation-01.md frontmatter to prove rendering works — this step MUST be completed before any build verification
Verify the build produces the series page with artifact HTML by running: npm run build && grep -qiE 'companion artifacts|github\.com' dist/series/agent-infra-maturation-01/index.html

acceptanceCriteria.text: Series schema accepts companionArtifacts field without breaking existing entries
A series page with artifacts renders artifact content in built HTML
